allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} patterns''''\); [print\(f''''  - {p[title]} \({p[category]}\)''''\) for p in d[-5:]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k!=''''decision''''}, indent=2\)\); print\(''''MODE:'''', d.get\(''''decision'''',{}\).get\(''''mode'''',''''?''''\)\); print\(''''AGENTS:'''', len\(d.get\(''''decision'''',{}\).get\(''''selectedAgents'''',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\(''C:/Users/Ro050/Desktop/contract_test2.json''\); const kb=j.data.constraints.filter\(c=>c.id.startsWith\(''KB''\)\); console.log\(''Dynamic constraints for Frontend:'', kb.length\); kb.forEach\(c=>console.log\('' '',c.id, c.rule.substring\(0,80\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\(''C:/Users/Ro050/Desktop/contract_all.json''\); console.log\(''KB entries loaded:'', j._meta.kbEntriesLoaded\); j.data.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.stageId.padEnd\(18\), ''static:'', c.staticConstraints, ''| kb:'', c.dynamicConstraints, ''| total blocking:'', c.blockingConstraints, ''| risks:'', c.riskCount\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\(''C:/Users/Ro050/Desktop/sim_result.json''\).data; console.log\(''=== PREFLIGHT SIMULATION ===''\); console.log\(''Overall:'', r.overallProbability+''%'', ''\(''+r.overallRisk+''\)''\); console.log\(''Input:'', r.inputAnalysis.complexityScore, ''-'', r.inputAnalysis.complexityFactors.length, ''factors''\); console.log\(''''\); console.log\(''--- Per-Stage Predictions ---''\); r.stages.forEach\(s=>console.log\(s.stageId.padEnd\(18\), \(s.successProbability+''%''\).padEnd\(5\), s.riskLevel.padEnd\(8\), ''KB-fail:''+s.activeFailurePatterns.length, ''KB-ok:''+s.activeSuccessPatterns.length, ''dyn:''+s.dynamicConstraintCount\)\); console.log\(''''\); console.log\(''--- Bottlenecks ---''\); r.bottlenecks.forEach\(b=>console.log\(b.stageId.padEnd\(18\), b.probability+''%'', ''-'', b.reason\)\); console.log\(''''\); console.log\(''--- Recommendations ---''\); r.recommendations.forEach\(\(rec,i\)=>console.log\(\(i+1\)+''.'', rec\)\); console.log\(''''\); console.log\(''--- Estimates ---''\); console.log\(''Tokens:'', r.estimates.totalTokens, ''| Duration:'', r.estimates.totalDuration, ''| Cost:'', r.estimates.estimatedCost\); console.log\(''Data:'', JSON.stringify\(r.dataSources\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\(''C:/Users/Ro050/Desktop/sim_result2.json''\).data; console.log\(''=== PREFLIGHT SIMULATION S0.1 ===''\); console.log\(\); console.log\(''Overall probability:'', r.overallProbability+''%''\); console.log\(''Overall risk:'', r.overallRisk\); console.log\(''Input complexity:'', r.inputAnalysis.complexityScore, ''\(''+r.inputAnalysis.complexityFactors.length+'' factors\)''\); console.log\(\); console.log\(''--- Stage Predictions ---''\); r.stages.forEach\(s=>{const bar=''█''.repeat\(Math.round\(s.successProbability/5\)\)+''░''.repeat\(20-Math.round\(s.successProbability/5\)\); console.log\(s.stageId.padEnd\(20\), bar, \(s.successProbability+''%''\).padStart\(4\), s.riskLevel.padEnd\(8\), s.dynamicConstraintCount>0?''[KB:+''+s.dynamicConstraintCount+'']'':''''\)}\); console.log\(\); console.log\(''--- Bottlenecks ---''\); r.bottlenecks.forEach\(b=>console.log\('' ⚠'', b.stageId, b.probability+''%'', ''-'', b.reason\)\); console.log\(\); console.log\(''--- Recommendations ---''\); r.recommendations.forEach\(\(rec,i\)=>console.log\('' ''+\(i+1\)+''.'', rec\)\); console.log\(\); console.log\(''Estimates:'', r.estimates.totalTokens.toLocaleString\(\), ''tokens |'', r.estimates.totalDuration, ''|'', r.estimates.estimatedCost\); console.log\(''Data sources:'', r.dataSources.pipelineRuns, ''runs,'', r.dataSources.kbFailurePatterns, ''failure patterns,'', r.dataSources.kbSuccessPatterns, ''success patterns''\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\(''C:/Users/Ro050/Desktop/sim_after.json''\).data; console.log\(''=== AFTER KB ENRICHMENT \(29 new entries\) ===''\); console.log\(''Overall:'', r.overallProbability+''%'', r.overallRisk\); console.log\(''Data:'', r.dataSources.kbFailurePatterns, ''fail patterns,'', r.dataSources.kbSuccessPatterns, ''success patterns''\); console.log\(\); r.stages.forEach\(s=>{const bar=''█''.repeat\(Math.round\(s.successProbability/5\)\)+''░''.repeat\(20-Math.round\(s.successProbability/5\)\); console.log\(s.stageId.padEnd\(20\), bar, \(s.successProbability+''%''\).padStart\(4\), s.riskLevel.padEnd\(8\), ''KB-fail:''+s.activeFailurePatterns.length, ''dyn:''+s.dynamicConstraintCount\)}\); console.log\(\); console.log\(''Bottlenecks:''\); r.bottlenecks.forEach\(b=>console.log\('' '', b.stageId, b.probability+''%'', ''-'', b.reason.substring\(0,70\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\(''C:/Users/Ro050/Desktop/sync_test.json''\).data; console.log\(''=== CROSS-SESSION SYNC ===''\); console.log\(''KB → Memory:'', r.kbToMemory.exported, ''exported,'', r.kbToMemory.skipped, ''skipped''\); console.log\(''  Files:'', r.kbToMemory.files.join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Memory → KB:'', r.memoryToKb.imported, ''imported,'', r.memoryToKb.skipped, ''skipped''\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\(''C:/Users/Ro050/Desktop/deploy_test.json''\).data; console.log\(''=== DEPLOY READINESS ===''\); console.log\(''Ready:'', r.ready, ''| Pass:'', r.passCount, ''| Fail:'', r.failCount, ''| Warn:'', r.warnCount\); console.log\(\); r.checks.forEach\(c=>{const icon=c.status===''pass''?''  ✓'':c.status===''fail''?''  ✗'':''  ⚠''; console.log\(icon, c.name.padEnd\(30\), c.detail.substring\(0,60\)\)}\); if\(r.blockers.length>0\){console.log\(\); console.log\(''BLOCKERS:''\); r.blockers.forEach\(b=>console.log\(''  !'', b\)\)} if\(r.warnings.length>0\){console.log\(\); console.log\(''WARNINGS:''\); r.warnings.forEach\(w=>console.log\('' '', w.substring\(0,80\)\)\)}")

Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\)\); if\(j.data\){console.log\(''''API returns REAL data:''''\); console.log\(''''  totalCost:'''', j.data.totalCost\); console.log\(''''  totalInputTokens:'''', j.data.totalInputTokens\); console.log\(''''  totalOutputTokens:'''', j.data.totalOutputTokens\); console.log\(''''  totalRequests:'''', j.data.totalRequests\)} else {console.log\(''''API response:'''', JSON.stringify\(j\).substring\(0,200\)\)}")

Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\)\); if\(j.data && j.data.length>0\){console.log\(''''From:'''', j.data[0].date\); console.log\(''''To:'''', j.data[j.data.length-1].date\); console.log\(''''Days:'''', j.data.length\)} else {console.log\(''''No daily data''''\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j\).substring\(0,200\)\)}")
